title: ADDICTION TREATMENT - 211info
text: SYMMETRY CARE INC ADDICTION TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include comprehensive substance use assessments, early intervention, intensive outpatient treatment, counseling for individuals, groups, and families, referrals to residential treatment programs, and court-mandated treatment services. 348 W Adams Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 573-8376 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 573-8376 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an intake appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and out-of-network private clients. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. Previous treatment records if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - HARNEY COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SYMMETRY CARE INC
